The '''Ison Trade Corridor''', also known simply as the '''Ison Corridor''', was a [[hyperspace route]] passing through the [[Ison system]] in the [[Anoat sector]].<ref name="Pirating" /> The [[planet]] [[Mataou]] served as an entry point to the Ison Corridor for [[starship]]s leaving the [[Corellian Trade Spine]].<ref name="Mataou" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Uprising]]'' {{1stm}}
